textauszug: UNIVERSITY PROJECTS 02 Bus & Student Palace, Diplom Grafton Architects, AAM 12 A building for experimental music, Atelier Miller, AAM 20 Wetland park and research center, Atelier Bonnet, AAM 30 Sportscenter reclaimed*, Atelier Burkhalter+Sumi, AAM 28 Solar Decathlon 2014 Paris, Atelier Hansp. Bürgi, HSLU WORK EXPERIENCE 38 Apartment building Bergen, Sarnen, Pilot study project 42 Swarovski office building, Männedorf ZH, competition 48 School in Horw, Luzern, execution project 50 Dagmarsellen housing, Luzern, competition 1st prize 2 Bus & Student Palace, Salzburg Diploma project, Atelier Grafton, 2017 ‘Between Memory and Contemporaneity - Contemporary Baroque’ Professors: Shelley McNamara, Yvonne Farrell Assistent: Silvia Milesi Accademia di architettura di Mendrisio 3 4 The project deals with two main problematics of Salzburg: The first is that buses arriving from south, have no place to park and drop the tourists off; leading to a lack of arrival sense. The second problem is, that even though Salzburg being a beloved city by Austrians to go to study, it has no character of being a university city, neither there is interaction between the different faculties. This research gave the project its function: A bus hall with a student hub on top. The project is strategically located on the hinge between the old city center, the main access road arriving from south and the Salzach river. First of all, it transforms what now is an area of no value into an arrival piazza, creating the southern gate of entrance of Salzburg. The ground floor of the building is kept completely open, letting the piazza come inside the building and leaving transparency towards the river and the old city center, inviting people in. The project takes the advantage of being located on the sunny side of Salzburg creating open platforms facing south. These are connected by ramps which guide visitors through a journey of discovery of views to the city. The spaces in the building are all interconnected, encouraging people to meet and interact. 5 6 PATRICK HELLER Msc, Diploma Accademia di architettura di Mendrisio B.arch, Hochschule Luzern Technikum & Architektur Portfolio - Selected Works 2013-2017 Contact Patrick Heller Luisenstrasse 38 Zürich 8005 Switzerland (e): patrick.heller@uol.com.br (t): +41 79 795 50 44
